categories.label: Meta Ads
categories.description: Facebook and Instagram advertising — campaign structure, audience targeting, bidding strategies, creative performance, and measurement.

categories.label: Google Ads
categories.description: Google Search, Shopping, Display, and Performance Max — Smart Bidding, Quality Score, keyword strategy, and attribution.

categories.label: Critical Thinking
categories.description: Data interpretation, budget allocation, competitive analysis, and strategic reasoning about performance marketing scenarios.

categories.label: Action-Based
categories.description: Real-world scenarios requiring specific, actionable recommendations — campaign optimization, troubleshooting, scaling, and reporting.

difficulty_levels.hard: Complex scenarios, trade-offs, and expert-level decision making

question_types.mcq: Multiple choice with a single correct answer — scored 1.0 or 0.0
question_types.open_ended: Free-form answer evaluated by LLM judge against rubric — scored 0.0 to 1.0
question_types.action_based: Scenario-based question expecting specific recommended actions — scored 0.0 to 1.0 by LLM judge
